(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Un  desastre! Más de  20min para esperar 3 sándwiches, encima  no había nada para elegir! Solo 3 mesas para sentarse! Súper lento el servicio, otra familia espero’ 40min!

(Translated by Google)
A disaster! Over 20 minutes to wait for 3 sandwiches, and there was nothing else to choose from! Only 3 tables to sit at! Super slow service, another family waited 40 minutes!
